ogTitle: Wallabi Point vs Wallacia: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wallabi Point and Wallacia.
heading: Wallabi Point vs Wallacia — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wallabi Point, New South Wales and Wallacia, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wallacia has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Wallabi Point (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wallabi Point or Wallacia safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wallabi Point has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Wallacia scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wallabi Point scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Wallacia scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wallabi Point or Wallacia?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wallacia has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
